query:
-- Test değerlendirmesi kaydı ekle
INSERT INTO performance_evaluations (
  branchId,
  employeeName,
  employeePosition,
  employeeIdNumber,
  hireDate,
  evaluationDate,
  evaluationPeriod,
  evaluatedByManager,
  managerOpinion,
  totalScore,
  evaluationScale,
  createdByUserId,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  1,
  'Test Personeli',
  'SERVIS',
  '12345',
  '2023-01-15',
  NOW(),
  '3. ay',
  'Test Yönetici',
  'Test yönetici görüşü',
  75,
  'İyi',
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Kontrol: Eklenen kayıtları göster
SELECT id, employeeName, employeePosition, totalScore FROM performance_evaluations WHERE employeeName = 'Test Personeli';
